description: Vegas for men from playboy is inspired by the glamorous city of Vegas and is a oriental-fougere fragrance. Top notes are apple, basil and tea the heart incorporates lavender, jasmine and geranium, while the base has musk, tonka, vanilla and georgywood.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
